---
title: "How RECAST works"
description: "The four-step pipeline, the two-referee review, and an honest account of what has been tested."
---

RECAST turns a published econometrics result into a replicated, causal-ML-extended,
AI-refereed report — with one deterministic code path. State lives in the
filesystem; agents communicate only through files; every number is traceable to an
artifact. The pipeline is built on three anchors:

- **Baiardi & Naghi (2024)** — the DML/generic-ML extension recipe (7 learners,
  median aggregation across many sample splits, adjusted standard errors).
- **Chernozhukov et al. (2018)** — Double/Debiased Machine Learning; and
  **Chernozhukov, Demirer, Duflo & Fernández-Val (2018)** — generic ML for
  heterogeneity (BLP / GATES / CLAN).
- **Berk, Harvey & Hirshleifer (2017)** — the refereeing doctrine (importance
  first; essential vs. suggestion; scientific arguments, not hunches).

::: {.docs-grid}
::: {.doc-card}
### [The pipeline](methodology/pipeline.qmd)
The four steps in depth: tiered replication and the failure gate, the estimand
router, the DML/generic-ML extension, and the blinding rule.
:::
::: {.doc-card}
### [The AI peer review](methodology/review.qmd)
Two isolated referees, a 19-point technical audit with blocking authority, the
synthesis quality-control step, and the round budget.
:::
::: {.doc-card}
### [Method-path coverage](methodology/coverage.qmd)
An honest matrix of what has been exercised, what has not, and what is out of
scope — plus why faithfulness is not generality.
:::
::: {.doc-card}
### [Walkthrough notebook](methodology/walkthrough.qmd)
The hand-built Nunn–Trefler analysis the automation later reproduced bit-for-bit,
available to download and run.
:::
::: {.doc-card}
### [Candidate scouting](candidates.qmd)
How RECAST finds new papers to process: it scans the AEA Replication Tracker for
available replication packages, screens each by identification design, and logs
every accept/reject — with the live candidate list.
:::
:::
